examples: The trees formed such a dense canopy that all beneath was a deep carpet of pine needles.
It was like a king's canopy, a fairy king's.
The light shone on him through the tree canopy.
Besides sun worshiping, planned local activities include surfing, canoeing, kayaking canopy walks and yoga.
Invariably, the cloud forest will seem well named, as tendrils of mist drift through the canopy.
